header.div: // Badge v1.0 · Sheldon K. Salmon × ALBEDO · March 2026

div.p: A new certification tier for physics, engineering, and scientific simulators. Distinguished from the STP audit certification — this badge is earned by a tool, not by an organization. It signals that the simulation was built under the AION methodology: citation-backed, red-teamed, and peer-reviewed.

div.span: 3-cycle sine wave — physics simulation universal language
Sheldon K. Salmon · AI Reliability Architect
Amber vs Gold. Shield vs Octagon. Org vs Tool.

div.p:
Amber palette. Shield shape.
Issued to organizations whose AI audit infrastructure meets FROZEN-2.0. 4 tiers ($2.5K → DoD).

Black & gold. Octagonal seal.
Issued to tools and simulations built under AION methodology: red-teamed, citation-backed, peer-reviewed.

Blue palette. Shield variant.
Issued to individuals authorized to conduct and file audits to the ledger under their own badge number.
